activated_validators.name: source_grounding
activated_validators.reason: Every book needs important claims grounded in the available evidence.

activated_validators.name: claim_evidence
activated_validators.reason: Claims are classified and checked by type instead of by domain assumptions.

activated_validators.name: continuity
activated_validators.reason: The manuscript must preserve thesis, terminology, examples, and progression.

activated_validators.name: research_method_caution_validator
activated_validators.reason: Activated for psychology and social-science style evidence claims.

activated_validators.name: safety_language_validator
activated_validators.reason: Activated for health, legal, medical, financial, or safety-sensitive content.

activated_validators.name: procedure_validator
activated_validators.reason: Activated for manuals, handbooks, implementation books, and procedural sections.
